meta.title: Leverage Without the Chaos: Introducing Turbo Tokens

transcript: Hey everybody, um, my name is James. I am the uh co-founder and CEO of Carrot. Also go by JSB in the chats. And uh when I started in in DeFi, you know the promise of DeFi was you know a better you know financial system, financial future. But in some ways it always felt like we had you know homework. You know you're rebalancing and checking out new protocols and figuring out where should my money go. Uh and at Carrot, you know we believe that DeFi should feel like holding really great assets, not managing a second job. Um and so really why we built CRT. Uh it's a single token that does all the yield chasing work for you. Uh you hold it, it earns, uh the price grows, you know no claiming, no compounding, no confusion. Uh if you are a holder you know that it truly just goes up and to the right. Uh you know CRT really helped prove something for us uh that complexity of the DeFi you know process or or the methodologies there can be abstracted uh for simplicity. Uh and really that's just the foundation for us. Um also we get great APY. You know this is why it's a passive hold, why you really like holding that asset. But the reality is earning yield isn't the only thing that people want. Uh you know what do you do when you're really bullish on an asset and you hold a really strong conviction about it. So you believe in SOL, you believe in Bitcoin, you know like we do. Uh and you really want more than just yield. You want real exposure to that asset and you kind of like want to turn up the dial a little bit. Right now you really have two options. You know option one you can go full degen mode. You know it's perps, it's margin, you know there's liquidation risk. Uh you it's fun until it isn't. Uh option two is just hold spot. Uh it's safe, responsible, kind of boring but uh you're really kind of leaving that conviction on the table. There's really no middle ground. Uh no way to amplify your position without babysitting it. Uh no way to express bullishness that still feels like ownership. We really need a third path. Uh leverage that feels like holding spot. You know conviction without chaos. And these are Turbo Tokens. Uh Turbo Tokens are leveraged exposure packaged into a single token. Uh you're not managing a position, you're holding an asset. Uh but it performs like leverage. Uh what's key about Turbo Tokens is they have dynamic leverage range so tokens like these in the past have been pegged to a 3x or a 4x or a 2x whatever that is. Um it has built-in risk management and monitoring. You know you're protected against liquidation on these things. It really says hey there's no chaos. There's no babysitting this position anymore. It feels like spot but performs like leverage. Uh it's the same philosophy that we brought with CRT uh to power you know give you the power of DeFi without all the complexity. Most people when they think about their capital kind of have two buckets. We hear the barbell strategy pretty often. Um you know there's the safe bucket, money you want to preserve and grow steadily. There's the conviction bucket, you know money you deploy when you see opportunities. CRT and Turbo Tokens are those two things tokenized. Um CRT is your earn layer. You park capital there, it earns yields, it stays stable. It's low touch, high trust. Turbo is your conviction layer. Uh it amplifies your exposure to assets that you believe in without living on a trading terminal. We see that the future is accessible DeFi. You know we started with this simple belief that DeFi should feel like ownership, not operations. You know CRT made earning effortless. Uh just hold the token. And now Turbo Tokens make leverage effortless uh with the same rules applying. Uh you no longer have to maybe figure out exactly all the things you have to do in DeFi. You can just hold a token. And as we all know that tokens are the base UX in our ecosystem. It's the easiest thing that you can do. Um our hope is is as you look at Carrot and say hey you can earn with CRT, you can amplify with Turbo. Uh it makes things truly effortless. Um our tagline here is feels like spot, performs like leverage. Uh it these are in your wallet, they are tokens that you own. And and really our hope is to say these are the tokens you want to share with your friends. These are the ones that you feel comfortable saying oh you should buy this. You know it's not a meme coin, it's not potentially going to zero. Um you know this is truly the future of accessible DeFi. So that's what we have from Carrot. We're excited. Please go check it out at uh deficarrot.com and trade with leverage that feels like spot.

sources.title: Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
sources.snippet:
Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f0866da8eed4c/6867a1f64ca2c75f0d14f371_16c97ce9017b907297827c5113a068f9_Frame%201597880158.avif)](https://www.drift.trade/)

Launch App

## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

sources.title: Metaplex
sources.snippet:
[Back to Blog](https://metaplex.com/blog)

## October Highlights

- **Genesis**\- Genesis powered two presales in October, accounting for 18% of the total monthly revenue, the highest share since inception.

- **Protocol Revenue** \- Protocol revenue reached $2.0M in October.

- **$MPLX Buyback**\- $1.1M of Metaplex protocol fees were used to buy back 5.3M $MPLX (0.5% of total supply / 0.9% of outstanding supply) for the Metaplex DAO.


## Pump.Fun Update (November)

On November 7th, Pump.Fun [disclosed in its developer documentation](https://github.com/pump-fun/pump-public-docs/blob/main/README.md) that it would begin minting tokens using its new Mayhem Mode through SPL Token-22 rather than Metaplex’s Token Metadata. This change went into effect on November 12th and since then the percentage of total tokens launched daily by Pump.Fun that use Metaplex’s Token Metadata has declined to less than 15%.

Metaplex Foundation expects this to result in a decline in Metaplex protocol revenue near term with Pump.Fun contributing 44%, 60%, and 45% of total revenue during August, September, and October, respectively, after peaking at 86% in January 2025.

In light of the slowdown in memecoin activity, over the last few months the Metaplex Foundation has intentionally supported the expansion of the protocol from being purely an asset standard to a broader platform for Internet Capital Markets on Solana. Genesis, Metaplex’s protocol for fair onchain token launches, has found product market fit with over $1.1M in revenue generated since its launch in July 2025 and is now scaling. Metaplex is well positioned to become the canonical end-to-end platform for launching, discovering, and trading new assets on Solana.

The Metaplex Foundation remains well funded with more than three years of operating runway to support the Metaplex ecosystem even accounting for the loss of Pump.Fun associated revenue. This excludes the value of Foundation's and the Metaplex DAO's MPLX positions, which collectively account for more than 40% of the total supply. While this change will have a significant impact on revenue, the concentration risk was well understood, requiring no significant changes in the Metaplex Foundation’s operating plans or capital allocation.

Please note that the October revenue figures that follow in the rest of the newsletter below include revenue from Pump.Fun given the change occurred in November.

## October Protocol Activity

In October, Metaplex generated $2.0M in protocol revenue including $1.6M from Token Metadata (78%), $370K from Genesis (18%), and $72K from Core (4%). Genesis accounted for 18% of total revenue, its highest share since inception.

Combined, token creation (TM tokens) and token launches (Genesis) accounted for 91% of revenue while 9% was driven by the creation of NFTs (TM NFTs, Core, BG v2).

In October, 766K Token Metadata assets were created, including 720K fungible tokens (94%).

Core adoption increased in October, with 238K mints driving the cumulative mint total over 4M.

In October, creators and developers minted over 4M digital assets through Metaplex, including 3.0M compressed NFTs. This activity raised the protocol’s cumulative total to over 960M assets minted to date.

Unique user activity continued in October, with approximately 420K unique wallets authorizing transactions powered by Metaplex.Approximately 290K new wallets collected a Token Metadata asset and over 570K new wallets collected a Bubblegum NFT in the month of October.

## Developer Platform

**Genesis**

October marked another strong month for Genesis, powering multiple token launches and expanding its role across gaming, DeFi, and consumer apps.

[The month began with PlaySolana ($PLAY)](https://x.com/metaplex/status/1977434437748150707), a consumer gaming company building portable hardware devices and an onchain gaming ecosystem. [Their fixed-price presale sold out within minutes, selling over $2.6M (13.2K SOL) to more than 1,600 participant

sources.title: Infrastructure Breakthrough as Bitcoin Munari Completes First Solana-to-Mainnet Integration Framework
sources.snippet:
[Accessibility: Skip TopNav](https://www.globenewswire.com/www.globenewswire.com#maincontainer)

# Infrastructure Breakthrough as Bitcoin Munari Completes First Solana-to-Mainnet Integration Framework

November 20, 2025 12:00 ET\| Source:
[Bitcoin Munari](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/Bitcoin%2520Munari)Bitcoin Munari

_Bitcoin Munari’s public presale is underway at the initial price of $0.35 as the project details the first iteration of its Solana-to-Mainnet integration framework, marking a key milestone in its multi-phase technical roadmap._

HELSINKI, Finland, Nov. 20, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Bitcoin Munari is progressing through its public presale at the initial $0.01 round, part of a ten-stage distribution cycle that runs through the project’s January 20, 2026 SPL token release. The presale phase coincides with the completion of the project’s first Solana-to-Mainnet integration framework, establishing the structural foundation for its transition to an independent Layer-1 blockchain in 2027.

**Solana Integration Framework Establishes Transition Structure**

Bitcoin Munari’s initial deployment on Solana provides an execution environment for early operations, liquidity access, and user onboarding. The newly completed integration framework outlines the technical path connecting this phase to the upcoming mainnet, including migration logic, validator-side tools, and token-mapping systems.

The broader roadmap aligns with the MUNARI principles — Modern, Unified, Network, Autonomous, Resilient, Infrastructure — which define the project’s long-term architectural direction.

**Presale Progress Anchored in Fixed-Supply Distribution**

The ongoing presale distributes 53% of the total supply across ten fixed-price rounds ranging from $0.1 to $3.00. All allocations release simultaneously on January 20, 2026, when the SPL token goes live on Solana.

A capped supply of 21 million BTCM underpins the model, ensuring that each round follows the predetermined pricing schedule and that distribution remains limited, transparent, and consistent throughout the presale period.

**Roadmap Advances Toward 2026 Public Testnet**

Development continues toward a public testnet planned for 2026, which will include validator onboarding, stress testing, and evaluation of the migration bridge between Solana and the mainnet. Testnet participants will have access to validator software, performance tools, and cross-chain migration functions.

_“The integration framework gives us a defined pathway from the Solana phase to the Layer-1 deployment,” a Bitcoin Munari spokesperson said. “Each stage is structured to ensure continuity between the initial token operations and the independent blockchain that follows.”_

**Structural Model Defines Transition Between Networks**

Bitcoin Munari’s architecture adopts a staged sequence rather than a single-chain launch. Initial token operations, distribution processes, and early liquidity take place on Solana, while governance, consensus, and execution shift to the dedicated Layer-1 network in 2027.

The migration mechanism uses a 1:1 conversion model, allowing SPL tokens to be exchanged for native BTCM once the mainnet becomes available. The separation of phases enables each component to mature independently before forming the unified system.

**Development Oversight Enhanced Through Independent Reviews**

Technical components associated with the Solana deployment have undergone external evaluation. Third-party assessments include the [Solidproof](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=BtW4puRN3DMONP7kHHuMyBPVCGzn7YL9GWFzHoybHhMc_yqFuCSyyPrWgTJYTulKGvjRpcPPWTJYC5m1DoK8BqGm0KgFQsmyDiJLITw9b4IVhbbqIRF8p1MnyNi4T6VC) smart contract audit, the [Spy Wolf](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=6i31MkC_vRgN39c-c0oWXd-xM6gRBfZQkewoLsmvGr3LU3oR3LZHP_x9bAsaTkNzB-jWlAR1EhH8yA58uq0B03x9iTApq9QvuROx-W-5XrHW8L7NOBiGVZ-lrWOHwtjfa_dBRcaRXwhyG1LG-Pj6EAHeuOkiw-LTe9S90o7Ifz4=) audit, and the [Spy Wolf KYC ve

editorial.headline: Carrot Unveils 'Turbo Tokens' for Liquidation-Protected On-Chain Leverage
editorial.standfirst: Carrot CEO James Blair introduces a new DeFi primitive that packages dynamic leverage into a standard token, aiming to eliminate the operational overhead of margin trading. This launch completes the protocol's "barbell" offering, enabling institutional-grade conviction plays without the risk of immediate liquidation.
key_takeaways: Dynamic Leverage Engine: Turbo Tokens utilize a fluid leverage range with automated risk management, preventing the forced liquidations common in fixed-leverage products.
Barbell Architecture: The product complements Carrot’s yield-bearing CRT token, allowing investors to bifurcate capital into "Safe" (Earn) and "Conviction" (Turbo) buckets via simple token holding.

Operational Abstraction: The protocol shifts the user experience from active margin maintenance to passive token ownership, adhering to the philosophy that "DeFi should feel like ownership, not operations."
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The narrative at Breakpoint 2025 has shifted decisively toward abstraction, and **Carrot** is leading this charge with the introduction of **Turbo Tokens**. In a sector where leverage historically equates to "chaos"—demanding constant monitoring of health ratios and liquidation prices—Carrot’s new primitive offers a sophisticated alternative. By packaging leveraged exposure into a single, transferable token, the protocol effectively decouples conviction from complexity. Investors can now express bullish sentiment on assets like **SOL** or **Bitcoin** with amplified upside, yet without the operational burden of managing a margin account.

Technologically, Turbo Tokens distinguish themselves through a dynamic leverage mechanism. Unlike previous generations of leveraged tokens that adhered to rigid pegs (e.g., fixed 2x or 3x) often resulting in decay or forced liquidations during volatility, Turbo employs a fluid range with built-in risk guardrails. This "set and forget" architecture allows the token to perform like leverage while retaining the user experience of a spot asset. For institutional allocators, this removes the friction of "babysitting" positions, transforming high-conviction trades into passive holds.

This launch also crystallizes Carrot’s broader thesis on capital efficiency, which CEO **James Blair** describes as the "barbell strategy." By pairing Turbo Tokens (the conviction layer) with the existing **CRT** token (the earn layer), Carrot provides a unified ecosystem for the two dominant investor psychological states: preservation and speculation. As Solana’s DeFi ecosystem matures into an institutional-grade financial layer, tools that abstract backend complexity while preserving upside potential are likely to capture significant volume from traditional VCs and sophisticated on-chain funds.
